summary_en: MARUI GROUP completed acquisition of 550,500 shares (¥1.65B) via TSE market purchase from May 1–15, 2026, representing 12.41% progress against authorized 10M-share, ¥20B program.
title_en: Notice of Acquisition Results and Completion of Treasury Share Acquisition
translation_en_brief: On May 18, 2026, MARUI GROUP announced completion of a treasury share acquisition program. The company acquired 550,500 ordinary shares for ¥1.645 billion via market purchases on the Tokyo Stock Exchange between May 1–15, 2026. This acquisition was conducted under authorization from a board resolution dated November 11, 2025, which permitted acquisition of up to 10 million shares (5.55% of issued shares) for a maximum aggregate consideration of ¥20 billion through May 15, 2026. As of the completion date, cumulative acquisitions under this program totaled 1.240 million shares (¥3.707 billion), representing 12.41% and 18.54% progress respectively against the authorized limits. The company noted that acquisitions did not reach the full authorized amounts because share purchases were executed opportunistically when future earnings power was not adequately reflected in the share price.
